name: Wan 2.7 Video Generation Tool
description: Generate videos using Alibaba Wan 2.7 models (text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video)
author: QwenPaw Team

tools.name: text_to_video_wan
tools.description: Generate videos from text prompts using Wan 2.7

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: DashScope API Key
config_fields.help: Get your API key from https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/

config_fields.name: timeout
config_fields.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
config_fields.help: Video generation usually takes 1-5 minutes. Default: 600s

tools.name: image_to_video_wan
tools.description: Generate videos from images using Wan 2.7 (first-frame / first-last-frame / audio-driven / video-continuation modes)

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: DashScope API Key
config_fields.help: Get your API key from https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/

config_fields.name: timeout
config_fields.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
config_fields.help: Video generation usually takes 1-5 minutes. Default: 600s

tools.name: reference_to_video_wan
tools.description: Generate videos with character/object references using Wan 2.7

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: DashScope API Key
config_fields.help: Get your API key from https://bailian.console.aliyun.com/

config_fields.name: timeout
config_fields.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
config_fields.help: Video generation usually takes 1-5 minutes. Default: 600s

meta.api_key_hint: Get your DashScope API key from Alibaba Cloud Bailian console
